translator.name: The Meaning of the Glorious Koran
translator.license: Public-domain English translation (as distributed by the Tanzil Project). If sourced from Tanzil, include Tanzil's translation licence notice and a link to tanzil.net.
translator.attribution: Marmaduke Pickthall, The Meaning of the Glorious Koran (New York: Alfred A. Knopf, 1930).
translator.note: SAMPLE renderings — verify against an authoritative source file (e.g. Tanzil) before shipping the full Qur'an.

verses.1:1: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
verses.1:2: Praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds,
verses.1:4: Owner of the Day of Judgment,
verses.1:5: Thee (alone) we worship; Thee (alone) we ask for help.
verses.1:7: The path of those whom Thou hast favoured; Not (the path) of those who earn Thine anger nor of those who go astray.
